LATEST NEWS
29 NOVEMBER 2022
Merge 2022.5822 for Windows improves character-encoding detection for HTML files and also fixes several defects.
28 NOVEMBER 2022
Cyber Monday Sale: Use code BLACK22 for 30% off a single new licence purchased through our online store before the end of 14 December 2022.
31 OCTOBER 2022
Merge 2022.5812 for Windows adds a files-only display option to folder comparisons and integrates with the new Windows 11 File Explorer context menu. It also provides several other enhancements.
24 OCTOBER 2022
Merge 2022.5809 for macOS adds support for macOS Ventura; it also includes other enhancements and fixes.
15 SEPTEMBER 2022
Merge 2022.5786 for macOS provides a number of visual and usability enhancements; it also fixes various problems.
4 AUGUST 2022
Merge 2022.5757 for Windows fixes a problem that could occur when upgrading directly from Merge 2018.5059 or earlier.
26 JULY 2022
Merge 2022.5754 for Windows fixes a problem with user-interface performance.
18 JULY 2022
Merge 2022.5752 for Windows adds the ability to reformat C, C++, C#, Java, JavaScript, JSON, and Objective-C files. It also features visual improvements, enhanced launching of external programs, and many other enhancements and fixes.
19 APRIL 2022
Merge 2022.5706 for macOS adds block expressions, comparison of corresponding numeric values in text files, and syntax highlighting for Markdown files. It also includes numerous other enhancements and important fixes.
14 FEBRUARY 2022
Merge 2022.5696 for Windows adds syntax highlighting for Markdown files and supports additional image formats. It also features many other enhancements and fixes.
19 OCTOBER 2021
Merge 2021.5644 for macOS adds support for macOS Monterey and includes other enhancements/fixes.
